title: gentiana pulvinarum subsp. subtilis
intro: Gentiana pulvinarum subsp. subtilis is a rare and lesser-known subspecies of the Gentiana genus, specifically a type of flowering plant in the Gentianaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties that can aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, improve digestion, and even exhibit antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Gentiana pulvinarum subsp. subtilis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
